_comment: Manually maintained run + queue registry. live_dashboard.py rereads this every probe cycle.

runs.what: StructMamba PEMS04/07/08 grid: 4 horizons x 3 seeds, canonical TSLib protocol
runs.progress: P07 pred-12 CLEAN: 0.0596 (std 0.0001) - ties DMamba published on canonical protocol. P07 pred-24 training. P04 rerun still queued (tainted).
0.0635 / 0.0839 / 0.1247 / 0.1878 - beats S-Mamba published at every horizon. Blog: milestone 1

runs.what: PEMS03 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds, canonical protocol
runs.progress: Crossformer pred-12 training (1.45s/iter); fixed: python3, reformer_pytorch, --freq m, disk cleanup

runs.what: PEMS04 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds
runs.progress: CrossFormer grid COMPLETE: 0.0679/0.0783/0.1609/0.1310 (published rows 1.3-3.1x inflated). TimesNet grid running.

runs.what: PEMS07 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds, batch 8 (N=883)
runs.progress: CrossFormer pred-12 done: 0.0677 mean, 44% seed spread at N=883

runs.what: PEMS08 audit: CrossFormer + TimesNet, 4 horizons x 3 seeds
runs.progress: CrossFormer 12/24/48 done (0.1368/0.1637/0.1914); pred-96 OOM at batch32, batch-16 fixup staged; TimesNet running

queue.what: CLEAN RERUN: StructMamba PEMS04 grid (4 horizons x 3 seeds) - prior results contaminated by dual-instance checkpoint races
queue.target_boxes: first free box (P08 audit box likely first)

queue.what: S-Mamba + DMamba self-runs under canonical protocol (verify code availability first)
queue.target_boxes: first box to finish its audit grid

queue.what: Phase 2 ablations: SE-ordered scan, hierarchical SE masks, SE-adaptive k (PEMS04+08, pred-12/96)
Protocol-inflation axis: rerun top-3 methods at their published configs
